pnpm.//: Security overrides for transitive deps flagged by Dependabot. Within-major bumps only (semver-compatible); per-major keys for ws/js-yaml so consumers of one major aren't forced onto another. The four mobile-runtime transitive majors (uuid, linkify-it, fast-xml-parser, markdown-it) are intentionally NOT forced here — they need a mobile-verified upgrade of react-native-markdown-display / expo, not a blind sub-dep override.
